SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffStringTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffStringTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<Integer>, StreamWritable, Writable
public class CoffStringTable extends Object implements Iterable<Integer>, Writable
COFF string table for storing symbol names that don't fit in the symbol table entry. Long names are stored here and referenced by offset.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Charset
    DEFAULT_CHARSET
    Default charset used to encode and decode string table entries.

    Parses a string table from a parser-backed COFF file.

    • CoffStringTable

      protected CoffStringTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Builder builder)
      Creates an empty string table for a builder-backed COFF file.
      Parameters:
      coff - COFF file instance
      builder - COFF file builder

    • CoffStringTable

      protected CoffStringTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser) throws IOException
      Parses a string table from a parser-backed COFF file.
      Parameters:
      coff - COFF file instance
      parser - COFF file parser
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      Returns:
      decoded section name
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while decoding

      Returns:
      encoded 8-byte symbol name field
